title: Cannot Access CRM System
description: I receive an 'Access Denied' error when trying to log into the CRM system. This started happening today after my password was reset.

title: Laptop Keyboard Not Working
description: Several keys on my laptop keyboard have stopped responding. This is severely impacting my productivity. Need urgent replacement or repair.

comments.text: Replacement keyboard ordered from supplier. Expected delivery: March 26th.

title: Need Training on Advanced Excel Functions
description: I would like to request Excel training specifically on pivot tables, VLOOKUP, and Power Query to improve my reporting efficiency.

comments.text: Training session scheduled for March 18th, 2:00 PM.
Training completed. Very helpful, thank you!

title: Network Drive Unavailable — Finance Share
description: The Finance department shared network drive (\\fileserver\Finance) is unavailable. The entire team cannot access shared documents.

comments.text: Investigating the issue. Likely related to last night's maintenance.
